description_long: This hammer features a long, straight handle with a squared cross-section, rendered in a dark, matte material that suggests durability and strength. The head of the hammer is blocky and angular, with a prominent rectangular striking face on one side and a metallic, forked claw on the opposite end, suitable for pulling nails. The transition between the handle and the head is reinforced with a lighter, metallic-looking collar, adding both structural integrity and visual contrast. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ergonomic enhancements or texturing on the handle, emphasizing function over comfort. The color palette is dominated by dark grays and blacks, with metallic silver highlights on the claw and collar. The hammer appears clean and unused, with sharp edges and no visible signs of wear or branding.
description: A blocky, dark-colored hammer with a straight handle and a rectangular head featuring a metallic claw. The design is utilitarian, with clean lines and no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen at an angle, highlighting the rectangular head and the metallic claw extending from the back, with the long, straight handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: This top-down view emphasizes the flat, rectangular head and the two-pronged metallic claw, showing the full width of the hammer's head.
description_view_2: A side profile reveals the length of the handle and the thickness of the head, with the metallic claw and striking face both visible.
description_view_3: Looking up from the base of the handle, this view accentuates the blocky, straight handle and the solid, angular head of the hammer.
attribute_handle_type: Straight plastic handle with a squared cross-section, smooth surface, no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular steel head with a flat striking face and a metallic claw for nail removal.
